mission.title: containerd: failed to create containerd container: error unpacking image: content digest sha256:16*: not found"
mission.description: failed to create containerd container: error unpacking image: content digest sha256:16*: not found". This issue affects 7+ users.

steps.title: Identify containerd troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your containerd deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n containerd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=containerd
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=containerd -n containerd --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for error: `"failed to create containerd container: error unpacking image: content digest sha256:1657edafda9d973766b6ba5a748da3c9570`

steps.title: Review containerd configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant containerd configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n containerd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=containerd
kubectl get configmap -n containerd -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=containerd
```
Due to a bug in docker https://github.com/moby/moby/issues/36789, when we repeat doing 
```
     docker tag image:v1 image:latest
     docker push image:latest
```
.

steps.title: Apply the fix for failed to create containerd container: error unpacking…
steps.description:
I have another idea about how to fix this. See https://github.com/containerd/containerd/issues/3401

Background https://github.com/containerd/containerd/issues/3401
```yaml
docker tag image:v1 image:latest
     docker push image:latest
```

steps.title: Confirm failed to create containerd container: error… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=containerd -n containerd --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n containerd --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that `"failed to create containerd container: error unpacking image: content digest sha256:1657edafda9d973766b6ba5a748da3c9570` no longer appears in logs.

resolution.summary:
I have another idea about how to fix this. See https://github.com/containerd/containerd/issues/3401

Background https://github.com/containerd/containerd/issues/3401
codeSnippets:
docker tag image:v1 image:latest
     docker push image:latest

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with containerd installed or the issue environment reproducible.
